description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and build, and a global cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} storing node_modules/. Add a lint job in the test stage using the node:alpine image that runs `yarn` then `yarn lint`, and publishes the JUnit report at reports/eslint.xml as an artifact. Add a build job in the build stage that runs on all branches except master, uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER/$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, builds the image with `docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" .` and pushes it. Add a build-master job also in the build stage that runs only on the master branch, uses the same image and service, logs in similarly, builds the image with `docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" .` and pushes it.
